title: PaymentTransaction
description: Data contract v1 for card transaction events on the `transactions` topic. Producers MUST validate before publish; the stream job re-validates and routes violations to `transactions.dlq`. card_token is a salted SHA-256 token — raw PANs/card identifiers never cross the wire.

amount.description: Transaction amount in `currency` units; negatives are reversals/credits

merchant_name.description: Opaque merchant identifier from source data

merchant_state.description: US state code, or foreign country name for cross-border txns; 'ONLINE' for online txns

errors.description: Authorization error codes from source (e.g. 'Insufficient Balance'), comma-separated

is_fraud.description: Ground-truth label; present only in replay/training flows, never emitted by production authorization systems
